description: Create a new Cash Journal entry in iDempiere to record two petty cash expenditures for GardenWorld. For the header, use the 'Cash' book, set the Statement Date to 12/15/2024, and use the description 'Week 50 Petty Cash Expenses'. Add two lines: one for 'Freight' with an amount of -75.00 and description 'Urgent delivery freight payment', and another for 'Bank Fee' with an amount of -25.00 and description 'Monthly bank service fee'. Complete the document.
